programmes.show_description: Catching up with the victims and villains of the rental market. Rachel intended to rent out her cottage for three months; four years later, her tenant is still there.
Craig has been battling to get his property back after three months of no rent. Terry was relieved to get his home back, before Sophia called the police.
Documentary series. In Bristol, Jon's dream of turning a former tram staion into flats was derailed by squatters, has he managed to get things back on track?
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Nurse Ennis changes the dressings on Antonia's finger, following a nasty accident with a coffee grinder.

In Chelsea, a female shoplifter is compliant at first, but then she tries to do a runner. And meet the former shoplifter who now works with shopkeepers to prevent their losses. (Ep6)
In Newton Abbot, undercover detective Nush spots a suspicious character in the crowds. She tails the suspect into a card shop but there's a problem - the suspect has disappeared.

programmes.show_name: Diana: The Princess and the Bodyguard
programmes.show_description: Ken Wharfe, Princess Diana's royal protection officer - and confidante - reveals the intimate story of the bond he shared with the most famous woman in the world.
There's a category one call for an 18-month-old thought to be suffering an anaphylactic shock. And teams attend a serious head-on collision involving a car and delivery van.
Forensics are called to a terrifying scene at a family home: a 33-year-old man has been fatally stabbed in his kitchen. Police embark on a huge manhunt to find who is responsible.
Enter the Incident Room, where killers are brought to justice. In this episode: how innocent 19-year-old Aya Hachem was caught in the crossfire of a contract assassination.

In Surrey, a quad bike rider is flagged down for a lack of number plates on his vehicle. A Surrey police sergeant deals with a serious incident which results in a midnight chase. (Ep5)
Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team go to the rescue of a Newport couple who share their home with their three cats and haven't deep cleaned their home in seven years.
Levi talks some sense into Remi. Lacey opens up to Holden. Cash is forced to lie to his wife.
At West Orchards, Coventry, Paige and Cory chase a suspected thief from a new toy shop in the centre. In London, a masked man bursts into a newsagents armed with a rounders bat. (Ep8)
A man is behaving suspiciously and may have a weapon. Guards Mark and Keith's number-one priority is to keep the public safe, so they put their lives on the line to corner him. (Ep9)
A heated argument between shoppers takes a dangerous turn, and the possibility of a weapon escalates the incident. Plus, chainsaw-wielding thieves target a convenience store. (Ep10)
In one of the Traffic Cops fastest ever pursuits - a flying fire extinguisher is launched at the cops from a fleeing getaway car at 165 miles an hour along the M1 motorway.
The hunt for suspected drug dealers, and the seizure of almost £50k and gear worth thousands.
In Derbyshire, cameras follow a national crack down on drugs including a money-laundering ring and suspected drugs runners.
Derbyshire's finest pursue law breakers. Karl is called to an accident involving a driver in his seventies who has reversed into a house and ruptured a gas main.
The officers face a 40-mile dash to prevent a potential suicide. One of the Evos comes a cropper on the road.
The interceptors catch a gang of car thieves red-handed. Officers clamp down on car crime at Essex's biggest shopping centre.
A massive manhunt ensues after three suspects flee into a farm. The team raids a drugs den, and officers stumble across a suspicious-looking postman.
As snow brings chaos to the roads of Essex, a knife-wielding man ruins New Year celebrations and the interceptors race to capture a gang of fugitives.
The iconic show is back to put a new generation of fakers to the test! This time high-end estate agent Rex tries to become a market trader in just 4 weeks. Can he convince the experts? (Ep1/3)

programmes.show_name: Peeping Tom: The Landlord & His Secret Cameras
programmes.show_description: This documentary tells the story of a powerful man who, for over 15 years, secretly filmed for his own pleasure, dozens of women bathing, undressing and having sex.
In 2014, realtor Beverly Carter vanishes after a property viewing. Her body is later found, and police arrest Arron Lewis, a man with a violent past and clear intent.
